name: Camelot
author: George S. Parker / Parker Brothers (classic) — AGP port
description: Camelot (George S. Parker, Parker Brothers) on the distinctive 160-square cross/plus board. Each side has 4 Knights and 10 Men. Pieces move one step (plain), leap friendly pieces without capture (canter, chainable), or leap and capture enemies (jump, chainable); a Knight may combine canters then jumps in one Knight's Charge. Jumping is compulsory (World Camelot Federation rules). Win by moving two pieces into the opponent's two-square castle, or by capturing all enemy pieces.
